summary: Comprehensive testing of ArvouraTech fullstack application completed successfully. All major functionality working including tree management, maintenance tracking, photo upload, GPS location, role switching, and responsive design.

design_issues.issue: Missing Dialog descriptions and titles causing accessibility warnings
affected_selectors: DialogContent components in tree edit, maintenance forms

passed_tests: Complete trees CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Photo upload to Emergent Object Storage
Role switching between client and agronomist
Landing page load with hero section and features
Tree creation form with GPS location capture
Tree detail page with edit/delete/photo upload
Profile page with role switching UI

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor accessibility improvements needed)
